message: Patient reports chest tightness and dizziness after new medication.
Caregiver says fever has returned and breathing sounds worse tonight.
Need wheelchair access and quiet waiting room for next appointment.
Client asks for an interpreter and written instructions in advance.
Please prepare the disability certificate renewal documents this week.
Insurance office needs a signed treatment summary and visit history.
Can we move the checkup from Tuesday morning to Friday afternoon?
Confirm whether the next remote follow-up link is still valid.
